title: campbellia neilgherrica
intro: Campbellia neilgherrica, also known as Nilgiri rose madder or Nilgiri madder, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain anthraquinone glycosides that exhibit laxative and astringent properties. The health benefits of Campbellia neilgherrica include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it useful in treating various gastrointestinal disorders. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as tea, decoctions, and infusions, as well as in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
